stemHtml: In a descent, an aircraft is landing into a rapidly increasing tailwind due to wind shear. What will most likely happen?

options.a: The aircraft will maintain the glide slope as stability is increased.
options.b: The aircraft will fly initially above and then below the glide slope.
options.c: The aircraft will fly above the glideslope.
options.d: The aircraft will fly below the glideslope.
